requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence and Coastal Derating for Kiribati PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据及基里巴斯光伏逆变器沿海降额
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據及吉里巴斯光伏逆變器沿海降額

summary.en: For Kiribati solar PV projects, inverter safety documentation should be prepared around IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence for the exact inverter model or family. MISE is the energy ministry and policy lead, MISE oversees the energy sector, and PUB controls the practical grid-connection interface, so project submissions should include accredited IEC safety reports, installation manuals, ratings, nameplate data, protection-device coordination, earthing instructions, and environmental limits. Kiribati is a humid, salt-mist coastal island market, so safety files should also address enclosure ingress protection, corrosion-resistant materials, terminal temperature rise, ventilation, and derating for high humidity and marine exposure.
summary.zh: 对于基里巴斯太阳能光伏项目，逆变器安全文件应围绕准确型号或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验证据准备。MISE是能源主管部门，MISE监管能源行业，PUB控制实际并网接口，因此项目提交文件应包括认可的IEC安全报告、安装手册、额定值、铭牌数据、保护装置配合、接地说明和环境限值。基里巴斯是潮湿、盐雾沿海岛屿市场，安全文件还应说明外壳防护等级、耐腐蚀材料、端子温升、通风以及针对高湿和海洋暴露的降额。
summary.zht: 對於吉里巴斯太陽能光伏項目，逆變器安全文件應圍繞準確型號或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗證據準備。MISE是能源主管部門，MISE監管能源行業，PUB控制實際併網介面，因此項目提交文件應包括認可的IEC安全報告、安裝手冊、額定值、銘牌資料、保護裝置配合、接地說明和環境限值。吉里巴斯是潮濕、鹽霧沿海島嶼市場，安全文件還應說明外殼防護等級、耐腐蝕材料、端子溫升、通風以及針對高濕和海洋暴露的降額。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
MISE standards adoption and conformity expectations where applicable
MISE and PUB project documentation requirements for grid-connected solar PV equipment
Project environmental requirements for coastal salt-mist, humidity, ingress protection, corrosion resistance, and thermal derating

summary.en: China safety documentation for PV grid-connected inverters commonly uses GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic CQC or CGC voluntary certification, and CNAS-accredited laboratory reports. These documents are useful for supplier qualification but are not automatically accepted as IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence for Kiribati projects. Chinese safety reports may also be based on China-rated configurations, labels, manuals, surge protection, and 220/380 V assumptions, while Kiribati project files must reflect 240/415 V, 50 Hz installation conditions and coastal environmental exposure.
summary.zh: 中国光伏并网逆变器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、国内CQC或CGC自愿认证及CNAS认可实验室报告。这些文件有助于供应商资质评估，但不能自动作为基里巴斯项目的IEC 62109-1/-2证据。中国安全报告还可能基于中国额定配置、标签、手册、浪涌保护和220/380 V假设，而基里巴斯项目文件必须反映240/415 V、50 Hz安装条件和沿海环境暴露。
summary.zht: 中國光伏併網逆變器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、國內CQC或CGC自願認證及CNAS認可實驗室報告。這些文件有助於供應商資質評估，但不能自動作為吉里巴斯項目的IEC 62109-1/-2證據。中國安全報告還可能基於中國額定配置、標籤、手冊、浪湧保護和220/380 V假設，而吉里巴斯項目文件必須反映240/415 V、50 Hz安裝條件和沿海環境暴露。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary certification programmes for China domestic PV inverter safety and performance

gap.en: Gap: A China-only GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 safety file does not automatically satisfy Kiribati IEC safety expectations. Exporters should provide IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports for the supplied model or model family, confirm that labels and manuals match the Kiribati configuration, document protection coordination and earthing, and add environmental evidence for salt-mist corrosion, ingress protection, humidity, ventilation, and thermal derating. Any changes to enclosure, terminals, firmware settings, surge protection, or nameplate ratings for Kiribati can require updated safety documentation.
gap.zh: 差距：仅中国GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自动满足基里巴斯IEC安全要求。出口商应提供所供应型号或型号系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告，确认标签和手册匹配基里巴斯配置，记录保护配合和接地，并补充盐雾腐蚀、外壳防护、湿度、通风和热降额环境证据。针对基里巴斯对外壳、端子、固件设置、浪涌保护或铭牌额定值的任何变更，均可能需要更新安全文件。
gap.zht: 差距：僅中國GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自動滿足吉里巴斯IEC安全要求。出口商應提供所供應型號或型號系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告，確認標籤和手冊匹配吉里巴斯配置，記錄保護配合和接地，並補充鹽霧腐蝕、外殼防護、濕度、通風和熱降額環境證據。針對吉里巴斯對外殼、端子、韌體設置、浪湧保護或銘牌額定值的任何變更，均可能需要更新安全文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice where MISE, PUB, EPC, lender, insurer, or project-owner documentation requires IEC 62109 safety evidence for grid-connected PV inverters
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T, NB/T, CQC, or CGC safety evidence applies to China domestic or voluntary certification contexts and is not automatically transferable to Kiribati

source.publisher: Asian Development Bank (Kiribati energy project specifications)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T or NB/T inverter safety files alone for Kiribati PV projects. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence for the exact model, align labels and manuals to Kiribati's 240/415 V 50 Hz configuration, and document coastal salt-mist, humidity, ingress-protection, corrosion, and thermal-derating controls. Confirm current MISE, PUB, and project-owner safety requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 基里巴斯光伏项目不应仅依赖中国GB/T或NB/T逆变器安全文件。请为准确型号准备IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据，使标签和手册匹配基里巴斯240/415 V、50 Hz配置，并记录沿海盐雾、湿度、防护等级、腐蚀和热降额控制。出货前请确认现行MISE、PUB及项目业主安全要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 吉里巴斯光伏項目不應僅依賴中國GB/T或NB/T逆變器安全文件。請為準確型號準備IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據，使標籤和手冊匹配吉里巴斯240/415 V、50 Hz配置，並記錄沿海鹽霧、濕度、防護等級、腐蝕和熱降額控制。出貨前請確認現行MISE、PUB及項目業主安全要求。
